title: KelvinStream
content:
# KelvinStream

Inherits from: StreamInterface


## Methods


### __init__(config: KelvinStreamConfig) -> None


### async connect() -> None

Connects to Kelvin Stream


### async disconnect() -> None

Disconnects from Kelvin Stream


### async read() -> Message

Reads the next Kelvin Message


### async write(msg: Message) -> bool

Writes a Message to the Kelvin Stream

code_examples.code:
from kelvin.application import KelvinStream

# Usage example
app = KelvinStream()
